title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: Context engineering is a technique that guides AI agents in software design by leveraging design systems. MCP enables AI agents to work together with design systems to build consistent and correct applications.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains how context engineering guides AI agents during software design by drawing on established design systems. It covers the role of MCP (Model Context Protocol) in letting AI agents work alongside design systems so generated applications stay consistent and correct. The practical takeaway: pairing design systems with agents through MCP addresses the gap between design intent and code, with context management and system architecture as the connecting pieces.
